title: Vapi Candidate Screening Interviewer — Instawork Pattern
description: Outbound voice agent that conducts a structured candidate phone-screen for an hourly-labor marketplace: confirms identity, runs role-specific skill questions, captures structured answers, and approves or rejects the candidate downstream.

tools.name: lookup_position
tools.description: Get the role description and required skill questions

tools.name: record_answer
tools.description: Save a structured answer with score

tools.name: approve_for_position
tools.description: Submit final approve/reject + structured rubric scores

notes: Instawork's exact stack is not publicly disclosed; pipeline reflects Vapi's documented 'flexible model configuration' defaults. Latency P50 anchored on Telnyx's benchmark of Vapi at '~465ms end-to-end in optimal configurations'. Vapi explicitly cited structured outputs and forward-deployed engineering as Instawork's reasons for choosing them over ElevenLabs and LiveKit.
